name: WLF_ATTEMPT_RELATIONS
description: Table to store attempt relations with tasks,assignments and learning items

columns.Name: ATTEMPT_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: ATTEMPT_ID
columns.Comments: Refers to root attempt id of attempts table

columns.Name: ATTEMPT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Refers to attempt type of attempts table

columns.Name: ATTEMPTED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Refers to attempt owner id

columns.Name: ATTEMPTED_BY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Attempts owner type like learner , admin , system

columns.Name: ATTEMPT_CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Creation date of attempt relation

columns.Name: ATTEMPT_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Refers to attempt completion date

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Refers to related object like task,assignment identifier

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Refers to type of related object like task or assignment

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Refers to learning item on which relation entry is added

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the learning item

columns.Name: LEARNER_ID
columns.Comments: Learner Id of the learning item

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the attempt , could be FAILED or COMPLETED

columns.Name: ATTEMPT_OUTCOME
columns.Comments: Column to store attempt outcome when saving (before submit).

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SCORE
columns.Comments: Learner score for the attempt

columns.Name: EFFORT_SEC
columns.Comments: Effort spent by learner in seconds

columns.Name: ATTEMPT_RELATION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: UserKey to uniquely identify attempt (on content) relation with assignment task.
